_note: CHAIN-WIDE FORMAT EXAMPLE -- intentionally non-authoritative. This file is an excerpt that illustrates the chain-specific manifest structure. It contains the first and last token ID of every (theme, tier, variant) block across all three themes and all three booster tiers. It is exempt from § 9 structural validation rules 4–6 and 11–14 because the "_note" field is present and the token count (66) is less than supply.total (600). To produce an authoritative manifest, expand the tokens array to include all 600 token entries (IDs 1–600) for all three themes, then store it at deployments/config/ethereum-mainnet/nft-manifest.json. See docs/nft-asset-manifest-spec.md for the complete field reference and validation rules.
descriptionTemplate: A Tricksfor Booster NFT. Stake this NFT to activate a reward boost during gameplay. An unstaked Booster confers no in-game advantage.
